default.$description: X 4, Y 4, Blur 4, black 12%. CSS: box-shadow: 4px 4px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.12). The only elevation defined in the Lunacy kit.

elevated.$description: Elevated panel shadow (Legend, floating panels). Stronger than shadow.default.

prominent.$description: Prominent shadow for toasts and elevated floating UI. 50% opacity — stronger than shadow.elevated (24%).
